title: Color Specification (0x4E)
description: Color Specification triplet layout. Length and TID are not mapped here; payload starts at offset 2.

elements.name: Reserved
elements.description: Reserved byte; should be zero. Present for alignment and future use.

elements.name: ColSize1
elements.description: Number of bits in component 1; see color space definitions.

elements.name: ColSize2
elements.description: Number of bits in component 2; see color space definitions.

elements.name: ColSize3
elements.description: Number of bits in component 3; see color space definitions.

elements.name: ColSize4
elements.description: Number of bits in component 4; see color space definitions.

elements.name: Color
elements.description: Color specification payload; format depends on `ColSpc` value.

notes: TID for this triplet is X'4E'. Length field (offset 0) and TID (offset 1) are intentionally not mapped per instructions. Color payload format depends on `ColSpc`.
